title: AI High Fashion Editorial Look
prompt:
[MODEL FEATURES]: full body female couture model, symmetrical face, flawless skin microtexture, confident runway pose
[CLOTHING FEATURES]: bodycon architectural dress, laser cut edges, reinforced seams, anatomical precision interacting with body structure, micro ribbed technical silk with specular reflections
[EDITORIAL ENVIRONMENT]: brutalist concrete studio with volumetric fog, editorial studio flash system with volumetric diffusion
[TECHNICAL TAGS]: Phase One XF, 80mm lens, f/1.4, ISO 100, 8K RAW fashion photography

The models' faces must not change or become distorted; their facial features must be preserved from every shooting angle. There must be no anatomical distortion.
description: A high-fashion editorial piece exploring material precision, architectural silhouette, and modern couture aesthetics.
